title: Star Wars Journal: Queen Amidala
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Bkcover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Journal:
Queen Amidala'' |author=[[Jude Watson]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[June]], [[1999]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=111 |isbn=0590521012 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |series=''[[Star Wars Journal]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars Journal: Queen Amidala''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel from the point of view of [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] during the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], her escape from the blockade, and the events that follow in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. ==Publisher's summary== ''My world is under attack. My life is in danger. But I must be strong. I must save my people.'' ''I will disguise myself. I will fight with all my power.'' ''I will never give in.'' ''My name is Amidala, Queen of Naboo. This is my story.'' ==Plot summary== This book covers in great detail the young queen's fears, doubts, and hopes as she fights to save her people. In traveling from planet to planet she does everything possible to insure her planet's security, while simultaneously seeking the balance in herself between the caring Padmé and the Noble Queen. In the end, she finds that her only hope is to return to her planet, and face the enemy straight on. Even with the odds against her, Queen Padmé Amidala rises to the challenge, and saves her people. ==Continuity== There are some inconsistencies between the novella and the film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']]. This may indicate that the novella was written before the film was completed. *In scenes recounting events from the movie, the dialogue often differs. *In the Senate scene, [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] is represented by [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], who did not succeed [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]] in the office until some years later. *Amidala's final entries make several references to [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], whose name was unknown to all of the protagonists at this point. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Journal: Queen Amidala}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Bkcover.jpg|English File:QueenJournal_Fr.jpg|French - ''Star Wars Episode I Journal: Amidala'' File:QueenJournal_Pl.jpg|Polish - ''Gwiezdne
